title: hieracium subasperellum
intro: Hieracium subasperellum, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Hieracium subasperellum have been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
